risk_areas.area: combine_and_cap() returns bare file_ids, no path/content resolution
risk_areas.mitigation: pipeline.py injects a new GetFileFn callable (file_id -> (path, content)); no real RPC client built, consistent with existing DI convention.

risk_areas.area: api/ has no router or gRPC client to the Python agent service
risk_areas.mitigation: Introduce api/routes package with a QueryPipeline Go interface; main.go wires a not-yet-implemented stand-in; real gRPC wiring explicitly deferred and disclosed.

risk_areas.area: proto/hivemind.proto has no RPC for the query pipeline
risk_areas.mitigation: Not extended in this subtask (would require regenerating both Go and Python stubs, out of scope for a single-commit subtask); disclosed as a follow-up gap.

regression_surface: agents/query/*.py (no existing files modified, only additive)
api/*.go (main.go modified to register routes; previously a no-op main)
